## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` — New feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` — Code refactor (no functional change)
- [ ] `perf` — Performance improvement
- [ ] `style` — Styling / CSS / Tailwind change
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation update
- [ ] `chore` — Dependency update, config change, maintenance
- [ ] `test` — Tests added or updated

## Testing

- [ ] Tested on **desktop** viewport (1280px+)
- [ ] Tested on **mobile** viewport (375px)
- [ ] `npm run build` passes (TypeScript + Vite) ✅ **mandatory**
- [ ] `npm run lint` returns 0 errors ✅ **mandatory**
- [ ] `npm run test` passes (or no new test coverage required) ✅ **mandatory**

## Checklist

- [ ] PR title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/) format (`feat:`, `fix:`, `chore:`, etc.)
- [ ] No hardcoded credentials, API keys, or secrets
- [ ] User-facing content is in **Bahasa Indonesia**
- [ ] No new CSS framework introduced
- [ ] `package-lock.json` updated if dependencies changed
- [ ] New or modified logic is covered by tests (Vitest + React Testing Library)
- [ ] All brand signatures intact (Claudesy standard)
